posts.text: image 1435×790 263 KB Seems CWIP continues to pile on. In fact, auditor highlighted the delay in CWIP as a Key Audit Matter… (FY25 Annual Report) image 1000×607 111 KB Anyone having an updated view post lifting of OFAC sanctions as that had severely impacted them vis-a-vis accessing forex for operational requirements? This was meaningful as exports were 75%+ of overall revenue even though USA was not a major destination. CWIP going live can be a meaningful event as proposed capacity addition was likely to increase the capacity by more than 3x. In addition, they also announced forays into indus…
